{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Visirian capital
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Visirian capital]] contains streets with buildings of fabricated silver and glass opposite ancient stone buildings.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
